raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX there were 3 transactions for a restaurant in XXXX. The amount charged was supposed to be in the XXXX currency. However, the restaurant charge the transaction in US dollars over charging me by XXXX USD. The original transaction transaction were XXXX, XXXX and XXXX in USD and should have been in XXXX ( XXXX currency ). I used my credit card to purchase water and tea and the total was XXXX XXXX. The restaurant ran the transaction charging me in dollars and also running 2 additional transactions. I submitted the dispute and the bank reverse the dispute and did not provide me with any information as to why.
